nasb.text: And it will come about that all who see you Will shrink from you and say, ‘Nineveh is devastated! Who will grieve for her?’ Where will I seek comforters for you?”

esv.text: And all who look at you will shrink from you and say, “Wasted is Nineveh; who will grieve for her?” Where shall I seek comforters for you?

cnv.text: 看見你的都必逃避你，說： “尼尼微荒涼了； 有誰為她悲哀呢？” 我在哪裡可以找到安慰你的人呢？

ccb.text: 凡看见你的都要逃避，说， ‘尼尼微毁灭了！ 谁会为她悲伤呢？’ 我到哪里去寻找安慰你的人呢？”
